summary: Controller code review allows APP-236 at the reviewed head. The dedicated renderer-to-preload-to-main IPC validates the narrow session intent, main process alone acquires the per-Harbor-child supervisor token, generic owner API rejects the route, and the renderer only accepts an allowlisted Harbor public response. Smoke coverage exercises missing and wrong authorization, bodyless request semantics, redaction, token rotation, and split-output redaction. No credential, Cookie, profile storage, raw evidence, automatic login, task execution, or external write is introduced.
reviewed_validation_summary: 2026-07-10 UTC, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run smoke`, and `git diff --check` passed. Smoke covers bodyless confirmation, invalid/missing authorization, generic owner API denial, public response redaction, token rotation and chunk-safe runtime output redaction. Deterministic review-readiness commands were executed against the installed Loom package because this App worktree has no `tools/` directory: `tools/skills_surface.py check` failed with `skills_docs_reference_sync_drift`; `tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only` failed with source-surface mismatch because the installed package lacks the required source/distribution markers. Both are external Loom tool-surface defects outside APP-236 ownership and do not alter the App runtime boundary.
follow_ups: Live packaged-App verification remains required after Harbor #241 merge; this review does not claim current user-session synchronization.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Controller-authored current-head implementation review found no P0-P2 product or security defects in the App-owned boundary.
